title: ゴルシ様、ダンジョンを探す

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm looking for a suitable place
outside the academy to train...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Golshi the Great is here! Ta-daaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In the same manner that tea demands desserts
and pike demands grated daikon radish... a
demon castle demands a final dungeon!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's an unbeatable pairing! Just like our
brotherhood!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I feel ya. "Life's a labyrinth." That's what
King Golshi the First said a real long time ago.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry! Leave it to me! I'll get you
the greatest dungeon ever!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For I am Horsegirl Lord Golshi! And I'll become
Dungeon King too! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what her obsession with dungeons is
all about, but I tag along with her until we end up
at...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah! What a wonderful city of water! The perfect
domain for me to rule over!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So it's settled?! An underwater dungeon?!
Omigosh, lil’ ol' Golshi here just doesn't know
what to do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this isn't the sea. It's my secret fishing spot.
Well, guess it's not much of a secret anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, a fisher-Horsegirl. Shall I add you to my party?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, pal. So what's all this dungeon talk? You
building an amusement park or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We do have the weather for it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, no kidding. Makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, this is Golshi we're talking about here.
You can't go overthinking these things.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah! Looks like another sweet spot for a
dungeon! Ugh, an Horsegirl Lord's work is never done.
Next, I say! NEXT!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
M'kay, I'll hold down the fort here, then. See ya
later, O great Horsegirl Lord!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What does a dungeon need, you ask? Why, a
battlefield on which to challenge the final boss!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And it's gotta be real spacious so your voice
echoes around needlessly. Yodel-ay-hee-hooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, Golshi! You're making a ruckus! Some people are trying to train, so stop getting in the—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You! You're—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, hold up, I've gotta think of a role for you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There you go, spouting more nonsense... This isn't
a playground, you know.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Where I come from, them're fightin' words!
Do you quarrel, ma'am? Eh? EH?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship looks ready to launch into either a
sumo bout or a pro wrestling match against King
Halo.
choice_data_list: O great Horsegirl Lord, you mustn't fight here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. This place ain't even big enough for me to
build a cas—wait. This might be a good spot for
training, though, y'know?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have I been speaking to a brick wall this whole
time?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we continue the search for the right place to
build a dungeon, we travel to all kinds of places.
In the end...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man, I just can't decide on a spot. They're all
amazing. Bruh, the world's so purdy...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I can't build a castle without a dungeon! Gah,
what's a gal to do?!
choice_data_list:
Why don't you just build castles in all those
places?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Say what now?! A mobile castle, y'say?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So it's gotta be one that transforms, huh? ...Yeah,
I can make that work. Might as well make it shoot
laser beams and fly too!
choice_data_list: No, that's not what I sa—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm going with your idea! A mobile castle! You can
leave the driving to yours truly, the genius, Golshi
the Great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's eyes sparkle as the plans for her
dream castle expand ever further in her mind.
